name: weather
description: Weather block class — a $block subclass that displays current conditions, a 14-day daily rollup, and a column-major hourly time-series payload for chart UIs. Owner sets `place`, `timezone`, and `units`; an external plug Worker (catalogs/weather/plug) fetches tomorrow.io on a schedule and pushes the bundle via apikey-bound session. Adds an `:ask` chat verb ("ask weather today/tomorrow/yesterday/<weekday>/<M-D>") backed by `current.local_date` and `daily[*].weekday` stamped by the plug.

classes.description: A weather display block. The owner configures `place` (a town name or zip code), `timezone` (IANA timezone for local display), and `units` ("metric" or "imperial"). The plug sends `place` to the upstream API as configured and pushes three internally-consistent props in one bundle: `current` (small flat map with the headline temperature, humidity, weather code, and observed-time strings — read by chat verbs and the badge), `daily` (14 entries spanning the past week through the next week, each carrying min/max/mean rollups per metric — read by chat verbs that summarize the week), and `timeseries` (a column-major ±7-day hourly payload sized for chart UIs, with one homogeneous array per field — read by the detail chart, never by chat verbs). `last_pushed_at` and `last_error` ride the standard $block writable_self surface so :look surfaces freshness.

default.message: owner has not configured location and timezone

verbs.name: weather_line
verbs.source: verb :weather_line() rxd { let current = this.current; let place = this:display_location(); let config = this.config_state; if (typeof(config) == "map" && has(config, "status") && config["status"] == "error") { return "Weather for " + place + ": error"; } if (typeof(current) == "map" && has(current, "temperature")) { let unit = ""; if (has(current, "temperature_unit") && current["temperature_unit"]) { unit = current["temperature_unit"]; } return "Temperature in " + place + ": " + to_string(current["temperature"]) + unit; } return "Weather for " + place + ": no current reading yet"; }

verbs.name: display_location
verbs.source: verb :display_location() rxd { let place = this.place; if (typeof(place) != "string" || !str_trim(place)) { return "this location"; } return str_trim(place); }

verbs.name: current_time_text
verbs.source: verb :current_time_text() rxd { let current = this.current; if (typeof(current) == "map" && has(current, "observed_at_text") && typeof(current["observed_at_text"]) == "string" && current["observed_at_text"]) { return current["observed_at_text"]; } return "an unknown time"; }

verbs.name: assert_configurable
verbs.source: verb :assert_configurable() rxd { if (actor == this.owner || has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { return true; } raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the block owner or wizard can configure weather", value: { actor: actor, block: this } }; }

verbs.name: set_location
verbs.source: verb :set_location(place, timezone) rx { this:assert_configurable(); if (typeof(place) != "string" || !str_trim(place)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "set_location requires a non-empty place", value: place }; } if (typeof(timezone) != "string" || !str_trim(timezone)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "set_location requires a non-empty timezone", value: timezone }; } let p = str_trim(place); let tz = str_trim(timezone); let state = { status: "pending", message: "waiting for weather plug to confirm location and timezone", place: p, timezone: tz, requested_at: now(), requested_by: actor }; this:set_properties({ place: p, timezone: tz }); this.config_state = state; this.last_error = null; let here = location(this); if (here != null && isa(here, $space)) { let ts = now(); observe_to_space(here, { type: "block_data", block: this, name: "config_state", value: state, ts: ts }); observe_to_space(here, { type: "block_data", block: this, name: "last_error", value: null, ts: ts }); } return { place: p, timezone: tz, config_state: state }; }

verbs.name: set_units
verbs.source: verb :set_units(units) rx { this:assert_configurable(); let value = str_lower(str_trim(to_string(units))); if (!(value in ["metric", "imperial"])) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "units must be metric or imperial", value: units }; } return this:set_property("units", value); }

verbs.name: open
verbs.source: verb :open() rxd { observe({ type: "weather_open", _audience_override: [actor], block: this }); return { ok: true, block: this }; }

verbs.name: ask
verbs.source: verb :ask(query) rxd { let q = ""; if (typeof(query) == "string") { q = query; } let result = this:resolve_day(q); let line = ""; if (typeof(result) == "string") { line = result; } else { line = this:format_day_line(result["entry"], result["label"]); } tell(actor, line); return line; }

verbs.name: resolve_day
verbs.source: verb :resolve_day(query) rxd { let daily = this.daily; if (typeof(daily) != "list" || length(daily) == 0) { return "No weather data yet for " + this:display_location() + "."; } let q = ""; if (typeof(query) == "string") { q = str_lower(str_trim(query)); } if (q == "") { q = "today"; } let current = this.current; let today = ""; if (typeof(current) == "map" && has(current, "local_date") && typeof(current["local_date"]) == "string") { today = current["local_date"]; } let today_idx = 0; if (today != "") { today_idx = this:find_date_index(today); } let n = length(daily); if (q == "today" || q == "now" || q == "tonight") { if (today_idx >= 1) { return { entry: daily[today_idx], label: "today" }; } return "No weather data for today in " + this:display_location() + "."; } if (q == "tomorrow") { if (today_idx >= 1 && today_idx + 1 <= n) { return { entry: daily[today_idx + 1], label: "tomorrow" }; } return "No weather data for tomorrow in " + this:display_location() + "."; } if (q == "yesterday") { if (today_idx >= 2) { return { entry: daily[today_idx - 1], label: "yesterday" }; } return "No weather data for yesterday in " + this:display_location() + "."; } let weekday = this:normalize_weekday(q); if (weekday != "") { let pick = 0; let start = today_idx; if (start < 1) { start = 1; } for i in [start..n] { let e = daily[i]; if (typeof(e) == "map" && has(e, "weekday") && e["weekday"] == weekday) { pick = i; break; } } if (pick == 0 && today_idx >= 2) { for j in [1..(today_idx - 1)] { let e2 = daily[j]; if (typeof(e2) == "map" && has(e2, "weekday") && e2["weekday"] == weekday) { pick = j; } } } if (pick >= 1) { let lab = weekday; if (pick == today_idx) { lab = "today"; } else if (pick == today_idx + 1) { lab = "tomorrow"; } else if (pick == today_idx - 1) { lab = "yesterday"; } return { entry: daily[pick], label: lab }; } return "No data for " + q + " in the +/-7-day window for " + this:display_location() + "."; } let date = this:parse_md(q, today); if (typeof(date) == "string" && date != "") { let idx = this:find_date_index(date); if (idx == 0 && length(date) == 10) { let y = to_int(str_slice(date, 1, 4)); let rest = str_slice(date, 5); let alt1 = to_string(y - 1) + rest; let alt2 = to_string(y + 1) + rest; let try1 = this:find_date_index(alt1); if (try1 >= 1) { idx = try1; date = alt1; } else { let try2 = this:find_date_index(alt2); if (try2 >= 1) { idx = try2; date = alt2; } } } if (idx >= 1) { let entry2 = daily[idx]; let lab2 = date; if (idx == today_idx) { lab2 = "today"; } else if (idx == today_idx + 1) { lab2 = "tomorrow"; } else if (idx == today_idx - 1) { lab2 = "yesterday"; } else if (typeof(entry2) == "map" && has(entry2, "weekday") && typeof(entry2["weekday"]) == "string" && entry2["weekday"] != "") { lab2 = entry2["weekday"]; } return { entry: entry2, label: lab2 }; } return "No data for " + date + " in the +/-7-day window for " + this:display_location() + "."; } return "I don't understand " + str_char(34) + query + str_char(34) + ". Try today, tomorrow, yesterday, a weekday like " + str_char(34) + "thursday" + str_char(34) + ", or a date like " + str_char(34) + "5/12" + str_char(34) + "."; }

verbs.name: find_date_index
verbs.source: verb :find_date_index(date) rxd { if (typeof(date) != "string" || date == "") { return 0; } let daily = this.daily; if (typeof(daily) != "list") { return 0; } let n = length(daily); for i in [1..n] { let e = daily[i]; if (typeof(e) == "map" && has(e, "date") && e["date"] == date) { return i; } } return 0; }

verbs.name: normalize_weekday
verbs.source: verb :normalize_weekday(name) rxd { if (typeof(name) != "string") { return ""; } let s = str_lower(str_trim(name)); if (s == "mon" || s == "monday") { return "mon"; } if (s == "tue" || s == "tues" || s == "tuesday") { return "tue"; } if (s == "wed" || s == "weds" || s == "wednesday") { return "wed"; } if (s == "thu" || s == "thur" || s == "thurs" || s == "thursday") { return "thu"; } if (s == "fri" || s == "friday") { return "fri"; } if (s == "sat" || s == "saturday") { return "sat"; } if (s == "sun" || s == "sunday") { return "sun"; } return ""; }

verbs.name: parse_md
verbs.source: verb :parse_md(text, today) rxd { if (typeof(text) != "string" || text == "") { return ""; } let s = str_trim(text); if (s == "") { return ""; } let parts = str_split(s, "/"); if (length(parts) == 1) { parts = str_split(s, "-"); } if (length(parts) == 3) { let y = parts[1]; let m = parts[2]; let d = parts[3]; if (length(y) == 4) { return y + "-" + this:zpad2(to_int(m)) + "-" + this:zpad2(to_int(d)); } return ""; } if (length(parts) != 2) { return ""; } let mm = to_int(parts[1]); let dd = to_int(parts[2]); if (mm < 1 || mm > 12 || dd < 1 || dd > 31) { return ""; } let year = ""; if (typeof(today) == "string" && length(today) >= 4) { year = str_slice(today, 1, 4); } if (year == "") { return ""; } return year + "-" + this:zpad2(mm) + "-" + this:zpad2(dd); }

verbs.name: zpad2
verbs.source: verb :zpad2(n) rxd { let s = to_string(to_int(n)); if (length(s) < 2) { s = "0" + s; } return s; }

verbs.name: format_day_line
verbs.source: verb :format_day_line(entry, label) rxd { let place = this:display_location(); let lab = "that day"; if (typeof(label) == "string" && label != "") { lab = label; } let temp = null; if (typeof(entry) == "map" && has(entry, "temperature")) { temp = entry["temperature"]; } let unit = ""; if (typeof(temp) == "map" && has(temp, "unit") && typeof(temp["unit"]) == "string") { unit = temp["unit"]; } let mn = ""; let mx = ""; if (typeof(temp) == "map" && has(temp, "min") && temp["min"] != null) { mn = to_string(temp["min"]) + unit; } if (typeof(temp) == "map" && has(temp, "max") && temp["max"] != null) { mx = to_string(temp["max"]) + unit; } let body = "no temperature data"; if (mn != "" && mx != "") { body = mn + " to " + mx; } else if (mx != "") { body = "high " + mx; } else if (mn != "") { body = "low " + mn; } let precip = ""; if (typeof(entry) == "map" && has(entry, "precip_total") && entry["precip_total"] != null && entry["precip_total"] > 0) { let pu = ""; if (has(entry, "precip_unit") && typeof(entry["precip_unit"]) == "string") { pu = entry["precip_unit"]; } precip = ", precip " + to_string(entry["precip_total"]) + pu; } let date_part = ""; if (typeof(entry) == "map" && has(entry, "date") && typeof(entry["date"]) == "string") { date_part = " (" + entry["date"] + ")"; } return "Weather " + lab + date_part + " in " + place + ": " + body + precip; }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let current = this.current; let place = this:display_location(); let line = this:weather_line(); let updated = this.last_pushed_at; let time = this:current_time_text(); let config = this.config_state; let config_error = null; if (typeof(config) == "map" && has(config, "status") && config["status"] == "error") { if (has(config, "message") && typeof(config["message"]) == "string" && config["message"]) { config_error = config["message"]; } else { config_error = "the weather plug reported a configuration error"; } } let text = "The weather panel shows no current reading for " + place + "."; if (typeof(current) == "map" && has(current, "temperature")) { let unit = ""; if (has(current, "temperature_unit") && current["temperature_unit"]) { unit = current["temperature_unit"]; } text = "The weather panel shows that the temperature in " + place + " was " + to_string(current["temperature"]) + unit + " at " + time + "."; } if (config_error) { text = "Weather status: error for " + place + ". " + config_error + "."; if (typeof(current) == "map" && has(current, "temperature")) { let error_unit = ""; if (has(current, "temperature_unit") && current["temperature_unit"]) { error_unit = current["temperature_unit"]; } text = text + " Last successful reading: " + to_string(current["temperature"]) + error_unit + " at " + time + "."; } } else { if (typeof(config) == "map" && has(config, "status") && config["status"] == "pending") { text = text + " Waiting for the weather plug to confirm the new location and timezone."; } if (this.last_error) { text = text + " Weather status: error. " + to_string(this.last_error) + "."; } } return { id: this, title: line, description: text, current: current, daily: this.daily, config_state: config, last_pushed_at: updated, last_updated: time, last_updated_text: time, last_error: this.last_error, location: location(this) }; }

classes.description: Metadata holder for the weather catalog: keeps the default summary_props list separate from the live class so plug installers and UI introspection can read it without colliding with subclass overrides.
